name: Stick Arena: Stickmen
description: Welcome to the world of epic battles! This game delivers physics-based combat where your agility, reaction speed, and strategic thinking are put to the test. Control a stick fighter, unleash powerful strikes, and perform acrobatic moves to defeat your opponents. Game Modes: • Single Player: Fight against enemies and improve your skills. • Two Players: Battle your friends on the same device and prove who the ultimate warrior is. • Survival: An endless mode where you must survive as long as possible against nonstop waves of enemies. Game Features: • Realistic stickman physics. • Unique attack animations and combo moves. • Exciting arenas wi
